meta.title: Industrial Cyber Risk Management with Jason Christopher
meta.description:
Jason Christopher is the lead author of the new paper: Industrial Cyber Risk Management, https://www.dragos.com/resource/industrial-cyber-risk-management/

Dale Peterson interviews Jason on this episode of the Unsolicited Response show.
- How industrial cyber risk fits into the business risk management strategy
- The proposed addition of resilience to the industrial cyber risk equation
- How much an asset owner needs to know about threat to perform effective cyber risk management (and how often it changes)
- When quantitative risk management will be feasible for industrial cyber risk
- The paper's proposed double heat map.
